items.name_en: Chane1🔯24k Camera Bag AS5190 Double C Coin Pendant Soft Lamb Leather with Retro Metal Unique body, simple yet not simplistic
items.name_cn:
Chane1🔯24k Camera Bag AS5190 Double C Coin Pendant Soft Lamb Leather with Retro Metal Unique body, simple yet not simplistic
The petite and lightweight camera bag design, paired with gold accents, adds a touch of playfulness and makes the overall look more romantic and elegant~
Paired with a classic woven chain, it is not only practical and exquisite but also enhances feminine elegance Dimensions: 12×18×7cm

items.name_en: 24K relief box bag with water diamonds ⭐️⭐️ Different happiness! Classic styles are coming out one after another, the box bag is somewhat familiar~ C, how can the classic box bag be absent? "+ The faces of this new arrival are somewhat familiar, it is also the return of a classic model. One is the classic box bag, the chain is decorated with carved diamonds 💍, combining leisure and versatility, and also has a different freshness. The multi-pocket design creates a stronger sense of layering, making a big innovation on the single shape of the box, like a combination of a box bag and a camera bag, full of personality. Model A Dimensions: 10-17-8 With packaging

items.name_en: CHANE* 24b Double C logo mini flap, made of polished calfskin quilted, soft, delicate, and elastic. Large Double C logo paired with vintage sand gold hardware, full of personality, a perfect blend of retro and fashion, super eye-catching, looks stylish with any outfit! Simple yet not simple design, looks stunning on. From leather selection to stitching, every detail is carefully crafted, offering high durability and practicality. Whether appearance or inner quality, it withstands the test of time. This Chanel calfskin mini flap is definitely a fashion lover's choice. Made of precious black gold calfskin, delicate and soft, exuding noble temperament, highlighting feminine softness while remaining elegant. Classic large Double C logo makes this bag even more brilliant. Can be carried by hand or worn crossbody, fits a phone and daily essentials, high usage rate, making you look elegant and intellectual. A must-have bag!

items.name_en: 🌟🌟🌟CHANEL 22bag mini	It's so cool~ it's my favorite, just browsing... completely want to buy a bag, eye-catching, must grab it haha! The SA was very nice. Chanel patent calfskin paired with vintage hardware, quilted, the mini 22bag is more refined than the larger size. The chain design is so Coco, double chains ⛓➕ leather strap chains ⛓, full of details. Tighten and open the bag using the two short leather chains on the front, the two long shoulder straps on the back are purely for carrying.
